message:
fix(runtime,command): ACL nopass flag, geo negative validation

ACL improvements:
- Add explicit nopass field to AclUser (was inferred from empty passwords)
- resetpass now clears nopass flag (user becomes unauthenticatable)
- Adding a password via >password clears nopass flag
- check_password uses nopass flag instead of passwords.is_empty()
- ACL GETUSER flags use nopass field for accurate reporting
- add_user correctly sets nopass=false when password provided
- Updated core_acl conformance fixture for resetpass behavior

Geo validation:
- GEORADIUS/GEORADIUSBYMEMBER: reject negative radius with proper error
- GEOSEARCH BYRADIUS: reject negative radius
- GEOSEARCH/GEOSEARCHSTORE BYBOX: reject negative width/height

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
